title: cryptostylis carinata
intro: Cryptostylis carinata, also known as the Rough-stemmed Net Spur Orchid, is a plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is known for its unique spur-shaped flowers, which are pollinated by certain species of bees and wasps. The medicinal properties of Cryptostylis carinata include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from colds, fever, and skin conditions, and it has also been used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas and infusions.
